title: pentaphyllum divisum
intro: Pentaphyllum divisum, also known as Five-Leafed Ligusticum or Chinese Lovage, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, Pentaphyllum divisum is often made into teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments. The plant's active compounds, such as ligustilide and butylphthalide, have been identified as contributing to its medicinal properties and health benefits.
